Phase.process_management_desc: Management of {phaseTitle} process for the sub-criterion.
Phase.suggestion_empty_desc: If you have a suggestion for upper management or other units, click the "Add New Suggestion" button.
Phase.suggestion_placeholder: Write your suggestion in detail here...
Phase.reject_description: You are about to reject this PDCA evaluation. Please enter a reason for rejection.
Phase.reject_reason_placeholder: E.g., The uploaded evidence file is missing...
Phase.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document? (It will be updated in the database when you click Save)
Phase.reject_empty: Please enter a reason for rejection.

Criteria.title: Criteria
Criteria.description: Manage the criteria to be evaluated for institutional accreditation.

Suggestions.title: Upper Unit Suggestions Report
Suggestions.description: All suggestions submitted by units during the "Improvement" phase are listed hierarchically.
Suggestions.no_suggestion_desc: Units have not yet entered an upper unit suggestion in the "Improvement" phase.
Suggestions.auto_generated_footer: This document was automatically generated by the quality management system.
Suggestions.unauthorized_desc: You do not have permission to view this page. Only Administrators can access it.

Calendar.title: Scheduled Action Plans
Calendar.admin_desc: Scheduled action plans entered for all criteria at the institutional level.
Calendar.user_desc: Scheduled action plans created for the criteria assigned to your unit.
Calendar.no_plan_desc: When you create a Scheduled Action Plan by going to the Planning tab in the Criteria menu, it will be listed here.
Calendar.risk_analysis_placeholder: Enter potential risks and measures for the process here...

Reports.title: Global Institutional Report
Reports.description: A comprehensive synthesis of all strategic criteria and quality processes of the institution.
Reports.generating_desc: Merging PDCA phases of all units. This process may take a few seconds.
Reports.report_summary: Compiles all main headings, sub-criteria, and written texts sequentially into a single file, along with evidences.
Reports.no_report_yet: No results report (Phase 7) has been created for this criterion yet.
Reports.auto_generated_footer: This document was automatically generated by the quality management system.
Reports.unauthorized_desc: You do not have permission to view and create the institutional report. Only Administrators can access it.

Tracking.title: Process Tracking and Analytics
Tracking.description: Real-time analysis of quality and accreditation processes across the university.

charts.no_data: No data has been entered yet.

Notifications.title: Notification Center
Notifications.description: Personnel PDCA evidence entries awaiting your approval are listed below.
Notifications.description_admin: Personnel PDCA evidence entries awaiting your approval are listed below.
Notifications.description_user: Current status of your submitted PDCA data entries (Pending, Approved, Rejected).

table.no_data: You haven't entered any data yet
table.no_data_desc: You can submit forms from the PDCA Management tab.

modal.title: Revision Process
modal.info_text: By uploading a new evidence file, the form status will be updated to "Pending" and submitted for manager review again.
modal.process_failed: Revision process could not be completed.

Assignments.title: Criterion Assignments (Allocation)
Assignments.description: Assign specific quality criteria to unit coordinators (Personnel) so they can enter data in the PDCA system.

main.select_user_desc: Select a unit coordinator from the list on the left to allocate specific quality criteria to them.

messages.fetch_error: An error occurred while loading users or criteria.
messages.atama_fetch_error: User's current assignments could not be loaded.
messages.save_error: An error occurred while saving assignments

Header.new_evidence_submitted: A new evidence entry has been submitted by personnel.

PeriodManagement.title: Period / Year Management
PeriodManagement.description: Manage periods for the system to work across multiple years. Archive and prepare for new years here.

modal.title: Add / Edit Period
modal.is_active_desc: Data entry and editing are allowed in active periods. Passive periods are read-only.

messages.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this period? Data belonging to this period (PDCA, evidence, etc.) will not be deleted but may remain inaccessible.
messages.active_period_required: It is recommended to have at least one active period in the system.

SelfEvaluation.title: Institutional Self-Evaluation Report (Stage 7)
SelfEvaluation.description: Review and finalize all evidences and descriptions collected for this criterion in a hierarchical report format.
SelfEvaluation.no_data_alert: No data entries found from the previous stages (PDCA) of this criterion. Please fill in the stages first.
SelfEvaluation.pull_desc: All texts and evidences entered in the Planning, Implementation, Checking, and Improvement stages are automatically merged.
SelfEvaluation.editor_desc: You can edit the text below and place evidences one last time before submitting to the institutional report.
SelfEvaluation.no_evidence_uploaded: No evidence documents have been uploaded for this criterion yet.
SelfEvaluation.reject_desc: Are you sure you want to reject all stages and the final report of this criterion? Please specify a reason so personnel can correct it.
SelfEvaluation.synthesis_desc: Synthesis of all stages and result report.
SelfEvaluation.enter_reject_reason: Please enter a reason for rejection.
SelfEvaluation.merge_data_description: Merge data to create your Institutional Self-Evaluation Report.

Maturity.title: Process Maturity Score
Maturity.description: Score and justify the current maturity level of the process.
Maturity.save_success: Maturity score and evaluation saved successfully!

QualityManual.title: Quality Manual
QualityManual.description: General synthesis of the institution's strategic criteria and quality processes.
QualityManual.card_desc: Compiles data entered in the 'Quality Manual' field across all criteria into a single Word file in hierarchical order (A, B, C...).
QualityManual.no_data: No completed data for the 'Quality Manual' phase has been found in the system yet.

Auth.login_desc: Sign in to start managing quality processes.
Auth.signup_desc: Register to join the accreditation system.
Auth.signup_success: Registration successful! You can now log in.
Auth.quote: Accreditation is the foundation of excellence and transparency in education.

Surveys.title: Survey Management and Distribution
Surveys.desc: Create advanced surveys and distribute them to the "Checking" pages of selected criteria.

public.title: Quality and Self-Evaluation Survey
public.desc: This survey has been prepared to evaluate our institution's practices within the scope of the relevant criterion.
public.success_desc: Thank you for participating in the survey. Your response has been successfully sent to the system.
public.footer: This content was created using the BKY System.

Documents.title: Document Management
Documents.description: All PDCA evidence files and documents throughout the system.

Syllabi.title: Course Syllabi (Syllabus)
Syllabi.description: Manage the contents, weekly plans, and evaluation methods of all courses in the department.

KaliteElKitabi.title: Quality Manual Data Entry
KaliteElKitabi.placeholder: Enter detailed explanation text or report regarding this criterion here...
KaliteElKitabi.placeholder_bgs: Specify its location on IT System...

KontrolEtme.evaluation_placeholder: Write your findings obtained based on the survey results and tracking data above here.

QualityManualReport.title: Institutional Quality Manual
QualityManualReport.description: Aggregate view and reporting of all quality manual data in the system.

Coordinators.title: Topic Coordinators
Coordinators.description: You can assign coordinators for the 5 main topics from this screen. Coordinators can distribute criteria under their topics to units and approve/reject incoming data entries.
